backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the e-commerce backend with CRUD operations for products, shopping cart management (per session ID), and order placement/retrieval using in-memory Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (homepage, product catalog, product detail, shopping cart, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing every frontend source file's purpose in one or two sentences, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Glow Shop — Luxury Cosmetics' that mounts the React app and includes Google Fonts preconnect links.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with routes for home, shop, product detail, cart, checkout, and order confirmation, all nested under a root layout route.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart line-item component displaying product image, name, price, a quantity selector with live backend sync, line total, and a remove button with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Section component that fetches featured products from the backend and renders them in a responsive 4-column grid with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a 'View All' CTA.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, brand promises, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Displays a full-width hero section with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and a 'Shop Now' call-to-action button linking to /shop.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a sticky Navigation header, a main content Outlet, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and a cart icon that displays the current item count badge.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product as a card with image, category, name, price, and an add-to-cart button that shows a toast notification on success.
frontend/src/components/ProductFilters.t: Sidebar filter panel allowing users to filter products by category (pill buttons) and price range (slider), with a clear-all option.
frontend/src/components/PromoBanner.tsx: Animated marquee banner with a rose-dark overlay that scrolls promotional messages (free shipping, cruelty-free, etc.) across the screen.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: Controlled quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons and a numeric input, constrained between configurable min and max values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products, shopping cart, and orders via the backend actor, using session IDs for cart operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers with custom CSS variables for a luxury beauty brand theme (ivory, blush, gold) including dark mode and marquee animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantities and a subtotal summary, handling loading skeletons and an empty-cart state with a link to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that shows an order summary with pricing, handles order placement via mutation, stores the resulting order ID in sessionStorage, and navigates to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page composing HeroBanner, PromoBanner, FeaturedProducts, a brand-features section, and a CTA section linking to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays an order confirmation screen after a successful purchase, reading the order ID from sessionStorage and showing next-steps info with links to continue shopping or return home.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Renders a full product detail view with image, description, price, stock status, quantity selector, and add-to-cart functionality, fetched by product ID from the route params.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Product catalog page that fetches all products and renders them in a responsive grid with sidebar filters for category and price range, including a mobile toggle for the filter panel.
frontend/src/utils/imageHelpers.ts: Provides helper functions that return static asset paths for the hero banner, promo banner, product placeholder, and individual product images with a fallback to the placeholder.
frontend/src/utils/session.ts: Manages a persistent browser session ID stored in localStorage, generating a new UUID v4 if one does not already exist.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury cosmetics theme with custom OKLCH color tokens (ivory, blush, gold, rose-dark), custom fonts (Playfair Display, Jost), box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a cosmetics e-commerce site, listing implemented features (homepage, catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, visual theme), required image assets, and metadata like schema version and known issues.
